name: Prime Services Indices - Wholesale Banking - Société Générale
snippet: SG CTA Index calculates the net daily rate of return for a pool of CTAs selected from the largest managers open to new investment. It is equal-weighted

name: SG TREND INDEX - Wholesale Banking
snippet:
• A subset of the SG CTA Index, designed to track the largest trend following CTAs and be representative of the trend followers in the managed futures space. Read more 3 pages
Must be broadly diversified (across asset classes and/or markets) (as determined by SG) Must be an industry recognized trend follower (as determined by SG) Must exhibit significant correlation to trend following peers and the SG Trend determined by SG) Must be open to new investment

snippet:
